title: tilia mandshurica var. rufovillosa
intro: Tilia mandshurica var. rufovillosa, also known as Manchurian silver lime, is a deciduous tree species native to Asia, belonging to the Tilia genus of linden trees. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tilia mandshurica var. rufovillosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to create medicinal extracts and ointments.
